@@ -187,10 +195,46 @@ fn build_wamrc(wamr_root: &Path) {
     Config::new(&wamr_compiler_path)
         .out_dir(wamrc_build_path)
         .define("WAMR_BUILD_WITH_CUSTOM_LLVM", "1")
-        .define("LLVM_DIR", env::var("LLVM_LIB_CFG_PATH").expect("LLVM_LIB_CFG_PATH isn't specified in config.toml"))
+        .define(
+            "LLVM_DIR",
+            env::var("LLVM_LIB_CFG_PATH")
+                .expect("LLVM_LIB_CFG_PATH isn't specified in config.toml"),
+        )
         .build();
 }
 
+fn should_build_wamrc() -> bool {
+    match env::var("WAMR_BUILD_WAMRC") {
+        Ok(value) => {
+            value == "1" || value.eq_ignore_ascii_case("true") || value.eq_ignore_ascii_case("yes")
+        }
+        Err(_) => false,
+    }
+}
+
+fn find_wamr_root() -> PathBuf {
+    if let Ok(path) = env::var("WAMR_SOURCE_DIR") {
+        let candidate = PathBuf::from(path);
+        if candidate.join("core/iwasm/include/wasm_export.h").exists() {
+            return candidate;
+        }
+    }
+
+    let current_dir = env::current_dir().unwrap();
+    let mut candidates = vec![
+        current_dir.join("wasm-micro-runtime"),
+        current_dir.join("../../wasm-micro-runtime"),
+        current_dir.join("../../../wasm-micro-runtime"),
+    ];
+
+    candidates.retain(|path| path.join("core/iwasm/include/wasm_export.h").exists());
+    if let Some(path) = candidates.into_iter().next() {
+        return path;
+    }
+
+    panic!("unable to locate wasm-micro-runtime source. Set WAMR_SOURCE_DIR to a valid checkout");
+}
+
 fn generate_bindings(wamr_root: &Path) {
     let wamr_header = wamr_root.join("core/iwasm/include/wasm_export.h");
     assert!(wamr_header.exists());
@@ -213,18 +257,20 @@ fn main() {
     println!("cargo:rerun-if-env-changed=CARGO_CFG_TARGET_OS");
     println!("cargo:rerun-if-env-changed=WAMR_BUILD_PLATFORM");
     println!("cargo:rerun-if-env-changed=WAMR_SHARED_PLATFORM_CONFIG");
+    println!("cargo:rerun-if-env-changed=WAMR_SOURCE_DIR");
+    println!("cargo:rerun-if-env-changed=WAMR_BUILD_WAMRC");
     println!("cargo:rerun-if-env-changed=LLVM_LIB_CFG_PATH");
     println!("cargo:rerun-if-env-changed=WAMR_BH_VPRINTF");
 
-    let wamr_root = env::current_dir().unwrap();
-    let wamr_root = wamr_root.join("wasm-micro-runtime");
-    assert!(wamr_root.exists());
+    let wamr_root = find_wamr_root();
 
     if !check_is_espidf() {
         // because the ESP-IDF build procedure differs from the regular one
         // (build internally by esp-idf-sys),
         build_wamr_libraries(&wamr_root);
-        build_wamrc(&wamr_root);
+        if should_build_wamrc() {
+            build_wamrc(&wamr_root);
+        }
     }
 
     generate_bindings(&wamr_root);

index 2e170a7..cbd721d 100644
--- a/src/instance.rs
+++ b/src/instance.rs
@@ -8,13 +8,24 @@
 
 #![allow(unused_variables)]
 
-use core::{ffi::c_char, marker::PhantomData};
+use core::{
+    ffi::{c_char, c_void},
+    marker::PhantomData,
+};
 
 use wamr_sys::{
-    wasm_module_inst_t, wasm_runtime_deinstantiate, wasm_runtime_destroy_thread_env,
-    wasm_runtime_init_thread_env, wasm_runtime_instantiate,
+    wasm_module_inst_t, wasm_runtime_addr_app_to_native, wasm_runtime_addr_native_to_app,
+    wasm_runtime_deinstantiate, wasm_runtime_destroy_thread_env, wasm_runtime_init_thread_env,
+    wasm_runtime_instantiate,
+};
+#[cfg(feature = "shared-heap")]
+use wamr_sys::{
+    wasm_runtime_attach_shared_heap, wasm_runtime_detach_shared_heap,
+    wasm_runtime_shared_heap_free, wasm_runtime_shared_heap_malloc,
 };
 
+#[cfg(feature = "shared-heap")]
+use crate::shared_heap::SharedHeap;
 use crate::{
     helper::error_buf_to_string, helper::DEFAULT_ERROR_BUF_SIZE, module::Module, runtime::Runtime,
     RuntimeError,
@@ -95,6 +106,70 @@ impl<'module> Instance<'module> {
     pub fn get_inner_instance(&self) -> wasm_module_inst_t {
         self.instance
     }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "shared-heap")]
+    /// Attach a shared heap to this instance.
+    pub fn attach_shared_heap(&self, shared_heap: &SharedHeap) -> Result<(), RuntimeError> {
+        let attached = unsafe {
+            wasm_runtime_attach_shared_heap(self.instance, shared_heap.get_inner_shared_heap())
+        };
+        if !attached {
+            return Err(RuntimeError::SharedHeapFailure(
+                "attach shared heap failed".to_string(),
+            ));
+        }
+
+        Ok(())
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "shared-heap")]
+    /// Detach any currently attached shared heap from this instance.
+    pub fn detach_shared_heap(&self) {
+        unsafe {
+            wasm_runtime_detach_shared_heap(self.instance);
+        }
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "shared-heap")]
+    /// Allocate memory from the attached shared heap.
+    pub fn shared_heap_malloc(&self, size: u64) -> Result<u64, RuntimeError> {
+        let app_offset =
+            unsafe { wasm_runtime_shared_heap_malloc(self.instance, size, core::ptr::null_mut()) };
+        if app_offset == 0 {
+            return Err(RuntimeError::SharedHeapFailure(
+                "allocate from shared heap failed".to_string(),
+            ));
+        }
+
+        Ok(app_offset)
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(feature = "shared-heap")]
+    /// Free memory previously allocated from the shared heap.
+    pub fn shared_heap_free(&self, app_offset: u64) {
+        unsafe {
+            wasm_runtime_shared_heap_free(self.instance, app_offset);
+        }
+    }
+
+    /// Convert an app-relative offset into a native pointer.
+    pub fn app_addr_to_native(&self, app_offset: u64) -> Option<*mut c_void> {
+        let native_ptr = unsafe { wasm_runtime_addr_app_to_native(self.instance, app_offset) };
+        if native_ptr.is_null() {
+            return None;
+        }
+        Some(native_ptr)
+    }
+
+    /// Convert a native pointer into an app-relative offset.
+    ///
+    /// # Safety
+    ///
+    /// `native_ptr` must be valid for this instance and must point to an address
+    /// in the instance's linear memory or attached shared heap.
+    pub unsafe fn native_addr_to_app(&self, native_ptr: *mut c_void) -> u64 {
+        unsafe { wasm_runtime_addr_native_to_app(self.instance, native_ptr) }
+    }
 }
 
 impl Drop for Instance<'_> {

@@ -175,6 +177,8 @@ pub enum RuntimeError {
     InstantiationFailure(String),
     /// Error during execute wasm functions
     ExecutionError(ExecError),
+    /// Shared heap operation failed.
+    SharedHeapFailure(String),
     /// usually returns by `find_export_func()`
     FunctionNotFound,
 }
@@ -192,6 +196,7 @@ impl fmt::Display for RuntimeError {
                 "Wasm execution error: {} and {}",
                 info.message, info.exit_code
             ),
+            RuntimeError::SharedHeapFailure(e) => write!(f, "Shared heap operation failed: {}", e),
             RuntimeError::FunctionNotFound => write!(f, "Function not found"),
         }
     }
